title: 1-star: 'The print didn't fit my frame.' Here's why it happens.
description: Manual resizing in Photoshop or Canva introduces rounding errors. Your 8×10 might deliver at 8×9.6 — just enough to misalign in a mat or frame. SnapToSize calculates every size to the exact pixel. 8×10 is always 2400×3000px. A4 is always 2480×3508px. 300 DPI, frame-guaranteed. snaptosize.com
